targets.label: Min 2026 (Jo Bhakdi)
targets.note: If not reached by Dec 2026, market is disappointed.

targets.label: Forced re-rating (Jo Bhakdi)
targets.note: Forcing function for a forced market re-rating.

news.title: Tesla Austin Robotaxi Fleet Hits 10 Unsupervised Model Ys
news.summary: Tesla's Austin unsupervised robotaxi fleet reaches 10 Model Y vehicles, the highest confirmed count for driverless service in the city.
news.impact_reason: Demonstrates continued fleet growth in core Austin operations, supporting steady scaling velocity through increased unsupervised vehicle deployment.

news.title: Tesla Dallas and Houston Robotaxi Fleets Reach 2 Vehicles Each After Launch
news.summary: Crowdsourced Robotaxi Tracker data indicates Tesla deployed 2 unsupervised vehicles in both Dallas and Houston by April 20 following April 18 launch, with low availability but confirmed rides during brief windows.
news.impact_reason: Confirms initial fleet buildup in new cities post-launch, providing mild positive signal for ongoing scaling momentum into additional Texas markets.

news.title: Tesla Unsupervised Robotaxi Service Now Live in Dallas and Houston
news.summary: Official Robotaxi account confirms unsupervised service rollout in Dallas and Houston with compact geofences covering suburban areas, building on Austin operations and aligning with H1 2026 seven-city expansion plan.
news.impact_reason: Directly supports accelerated unsupervised scaling across Texas by adding high-demand markets with quick geofence expansion history, increasing overall fleet velocity beyond Austin.

news.title: Tesla Expands Unsupervised Robotaxi to Dallas and Houston
news.summary: Tesla announced rollout of unsupervised robotaxi service in Dallas and Houston, with geofence maps for initial service areas and video showing driverless Model Y operation. Crowdsourced data shows initial deployment of 1 vehicle per city, expanding to 2 each by April 20.
news.impact_reason: Expansion to two additional Texas cities triples the state's unsupervised robotaxi hubs, enabling rapid data collection and scaling potential in favorable regulatory environment despite small initial fleet sizes.
